Godot Parity Matrix

Live status of the Godot 4 port against the React + Phaser game, one row per React surface (slice / view / modal / system / golden / infra). This is the queryable replacement for the prose progress tracker — the source of truth is docs/parity-matrix.json; this page is generated from it.

generated_from: audit wndlmekjg + plan the-current-state-of-deep-crystal.md · rebuild: node tools/build-parity-matrix.mjs · CI guard: node tools/check-parity-matrix.mjs

Related docs: roadmap (M5→M11 parity arc) · narrative archive (milestone screenshots)

Parity
21%
171 rows · 15 full · 43 partial · 113 absent
full = logic + UI ported & verified partial = logic done / UI or art pending absent = not started (parity weights full 1.0, partial 0.5)

slice 30

0 full10 partial20 absent

view 18

0 full5 partial13 absent

modal 8

0 full2 partial6 absent

system 30

15 full4 partial11 absent

golden 79

0 full22 partial57 absent

infra 6

0 full0 partial6 absent
Category
Status
Milestone
Search 171 / 171 rows
Feature / screen ↕ Category ↕ Godot ↕ Milestone ↕ Verified by
DONEAlready ported (logic + slice UI)15/16 full · 1 partial · 0 absent
boss sliceBoss encounter system ported (one boss, Frostmaw); modal confirmation re-skin handled by M5/M9.slicepartialDONErun_boss_tests.gd
Audio / SFXSynthesizes every SFX as 16-bit PCM AudioStreamWAV, ported 1:1 from src/audio/index.ts. Pooled players, mute pref persisted.systemfullDONErun_audio_tests.gd
Board chain mechanic (drag, 8-way adjacency, min-chain, boss bar)is_valid_chain/has_valid_chain ported from src/game/chain.ts; boss min_chain raises the bar.systemfullDONErun_tests.gdrun_scene_smoke.gd
Buildings / spawners / plots (logic)build/demolish/plot-gating works as LOGIC (spawner adds tile category to refill pool). Spatial placement map is the M6 gap; catalog is a 7-building subset.systemfullDONErun_building_tests.gdrun_town_ui_tests.gd
Capstone boss (Frostmaw)start_boss gating (City + mine mastery), raises min_chain, damage_boss by chain length, defeat sets town2_complete. One boss.systemfullDONErun_boss_tests.gd
Collapse / refill pipelinePure collapse()+refill() (weighted pool) plus animated visual collapse/pop-in; reshuffles dead boards.systemfullDONErun_tests.gdrun_scene_smoke.gd
Economy: coins / inventory / fractional progress accumulatorcredit_chain reproduces React resourceProgress carry-over exactly; storage cap enforced. Coins simplified (chain_len/2).systemfullDONErun_economy_tests.gdrun_state_tests.gd
Inventory ledgerRead-only grouped ledger (Farm/Refined/Mine/Other) with counts, sell prices, line + total value. Pure compute helpers tested.systemfullDONErun_inventory_tests.gd
Market (sell / buy)sell/buy with cap discipline + markup (sink not arbitrage); buy logic tested but TownScreen is sell-only (no UI surface).systemfullDONErun_economy_tests.gd
Mine expedition (Town 2)enter_mine converts supplies->turns, mine pool swaps board, soft-fail on turn exhaustion, leave_mine. Single shared inventory.systemfullDONErun_mine_tests.gd
NPC orders (coin sink)Seeded RNG generation, refill to MAX_ORDERS, fill_order with reward > market incentive; wired to TownScreen.systemfullDONErun_orders_tests.gd
Rats hazard (Town 3)RAT tiles seed farm pool once town2_complete; Ratcatcher + Master Ratcatcher. Note: RAT has no PNG (flat placeholder) -> art fed in M7.systemfullDONErun_rats_tests.gd
Rubble hazard (mine cave-ins)RUBBLE seeds mine pool; cleared by STONE chains sweeping 8-adjacent rubble. No PNG yet (flat placeholder) -> art fed in M7.systemfullDONErun_rubble_tests.gd
Save / loadVersioned JSON to user://save.json, mismatched versions discarded; from_dict defensively parsed. Round-trip tested.systemfullDONErun_state_tests.gd
Settlement tier ladder (Camp -> City)5-tier ladder with caps/plots/unlocks and deadlock-free escalating costs; can_tier_up/try_tier_up wired + tested.systemfullDONErun_town_tests.gdrun_state_tests.gd
Town list UI (build/sell/fill button rows)TownScreen.gd list-modal of build/refine/market/orders/expedition rows; every button registered under a stable key for tests. Spatial map is M6.systemfullDONErun_town_ui_tests.gd
M5UI Foundation: Theme + scenes + router + signal bus0/17 full · 13 partial · 4 absent
inventory sliceInventory ledger ported; grid/list/search re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.slicepartialM5run_inventory_tests.gdgolden:inventory-grid-all
orders sliceOrders logic + TownScreen section ported; re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.slicepartialM5run_orders_tests.gdgolden:orders-mixed
settings sliceOptions/mute pref ported in MenuScreen; re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.slicepartialM5run_menu_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-settings
inventory viewResource inventory and search; re-skin onto Theme+scenes in M5.viewpartialM5run_inventory_tests.gdgolden:inventory-grid-all
orders viewNPC trade orders; re-skin onto Theme+scenes in M5.viewpartialM5run_orders_tests.gdgolden:orders-mixed
leaveBoard modalLeave-board confirmation; wired through the M5 router/ModalShell.modalabsentM5run_router_tests.gdgolden:shell-leave-board-confirm
menu modalMenuScreen ported; re-skin onto ModalShell + router in M5.modalpartialM5run_menu_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-main
inventory-full-with-progressInventory nearly full; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-full-with-progress
inventory-grid-allInventory grid view; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-grid-all
inventory-list-modeInventory list view; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-list-mode
inventory-mid-progressInventory with some resources; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-mid-progress
inventory-search-emptyInventory search with no results; search UI added in M5 re-skin.goldenabsentM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-search-empty
orders-mixedOrders view with mixed filled/unfilled; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:orders-mixed
shell-leave-board-confirmLeave board confirmation; wired through the M5 router/ModalShell.goldenabsentM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-leave-board-confirm
shell-menu-mainSettings menu main tab; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-main
shell-menu-settingsSettings menu options tab; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-settings
shell-toast-bubbleToast notification; toast component lands with the M5 UI vocabulary.goldenabsentM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-toast-bubble
M6Spatial town building-placement map0/10 full · 1 partial · 9 absent
market sliceMarket trades ported (sell+buy tested); buy UI surface + price drift land with the town surfaces in M6.slicepartialM6run_economy_tests.gdgolden:town-market-news
town viewSpatial town building-placement map with roads/river/trees. Godot has a button-row list, not a map.viewabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gde2e:town-buildgolden:town-home-built-out
shell-town-freshTown view from shell; depends on M6 spatial town map.goldenabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gdgolden:shell-town-fresh
town-build-picker-lockedBuilding picker with locked buildings; depends on M6.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-build-picker-locked
town-build-picker-readyBuilding picker ready to build; depends on M6 BuildPicker scene.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-build-picker-ready
town-building-tooltipBuilding placement tooltip; depends on M6 Plot/BuildingTooltip scenes.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-building-tooltip
town-home-built-outTown with multiple buildings placed; depends on M6 spatial town map.goldenabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gde2e:town-buildgolden:town-home-built-out
town-home-freshTown at start (no buildings); depends on M6 spatial town map.goldenabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gdgolden:town-home-fresh
town-market-newsTown market news/prices; market BUY surface wired into the M6 town.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-market-news
town-placement-modeBuilding placement mode active; depends on M6.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-placement-mode
M7Effects/juice + tile-art feed0/11 full · 11 partial · 0 absent
farm sliceFarm biome board ported; tile effects/art + farm-specific juice land in M7.slicepartialM7run_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-idle
mine sliceMine expedition + rubble ported; full hazard set + tile art land in M7.slicepartialM7run_mine_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-hazards
board viewMain puzzle board gameplay; renders but lacks tile art + effects until M7.viewpartialM7run_scene_smoke.gdgolden:board-farm-idle
Board animations & effectsTween juice exists (fly-to-coins chip, pop-in, chain glow); lacks GPUParticles, cascade/refill tweening, seasonal tint, floaters.systempartialM7run_assets_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-chain-7
Farm hazards (Fire/Rats/Wolves)Rats fully ported; fire/wolves absent. Hazard visual overlays + missing tile art come in M7.systempartialM7run_rats_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-fire-rats
Mine hazards (Cave-in/Gas Vent/Lava/Mole)Rubble (cave-in) ported; gas-vent/lava/mole absent. Hazard overlays + missing tile art come in M7.systempartialM7run_rubble_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-hazards
board-farm-chain-7Farm with 7-tile chain highlight; tile art + chain-glow polish (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-chain-7
board-farm-fire-ratsFarm with fire and rat hazards; rat art + fire system overlays (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-fire-rats
board-farm-idleFarm biome board at start; needs tile art feed (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-idle
board-mine-hazardsMine with cave-in/gas-vent/lava hazards; rubble art + hazard overlays (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-hazards
board-mine-idleMine biome board at start; needs mine tile art feed (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-idle
M-infraTesting parity: GdUnit4 + e2e + visual golden-diff0/7 full · 0 partial · 7 absent
debug modalDebug panel; pairs with the test/deep-link harness in M-infra.modalabsentM-infragolden:shell-debug-modal
shell-debug-modalDebug panel modal; pairs with the deep-link/test harness in M-infra.goldenabsentM-infrarun_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-debug-modal
E2E input-sim DSL (InputEvent + scene-state harness)No input simulation today. Build an InputEventMouseButton/Key + scene-state DSL beside run_slice_e2e.gd; port ~5 Playwright specs.infraabsentM-infrae2e:smokee2e:navigatione2e:chaine2e:town-build
GdUnit4 adoption (auto-discovery + parallel unit suites)Adopt GdUnit4 + gdUnit GitHub action; migrate the 17 monolithic run_*.gd runners one class per system, kept as a compatibility harness until migrated.infraabsentM-infragdunit4:suite-greenci:godot-ci.yml
Parity-matrix CI validation checkParses docs/parity-matrix.json and fails if any 'full' row names a run_*.gd suite that does not exist on disk. Built in this PR; wired into godot-ci.yml in M-infra.infraabsentM-infracheck-parity-matrix.mjsci:godot-ci.yml
Post-export web smoke (serve godot/dist + Playwright)Closes the 'export succeeds but untested' gap: serve godot/dist after Web export and run a Playwright smoke spec against it.infraabsentM-infraci:web-smokee2e:smoke-web
Visual golden-diff suite (run_visual_tests.gd + __goldens__ diff)Generalize tools/screenshot.gd into a scenario x viewport matrix capturing PNGs under godot/tests/visual/__goldens__/{scenario}/{vp}.png with pixelwise diff.infraabsentM-infrarun_visual_tests.gdgolden:__goldens__-diff
M8Tools + tool-powers0/8 full · 4 partial · 4 absent
portal sliceMagic tools that auto-apply without board selection; ported with M8 tools/tool-powers.sliceabsentM8run_tools_tests.gde2e:tools
portal viewMagic tools; ported with M8 tools/tool-powers.viewabsentM8run_tools_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-tool-rake
Abilities & tool powersNo ability/power system. Magic tools (golden apple, philosophers_stone) with fill_bias/tap-target/instant powers, ported with M8 tools.systemabsentM8run_tools_tests.gde2e:toolsgolden:board-farm-fertilizer-active
Tools (axe/bomb/rake/shovel + 20+ others)No tool items, no tool-use action, no tool powers. LOGIC FIRST: ToolConfig.gd + GameState.use_tool before any palette UI.systemabsentM8run_tools_tests.gde2e:toolsgolden:board-farm-tool-rake

M10Long-tail content (cartography/townsfolk/achievements/story/tile-collection/fish)0/86 full · 8 partial · 78 absent
achievements sliceTrophy/collection tracker for gameplay milestones.sliceabsentM10run_achievements_tests.gd
almanac sliceQuest reference (now merged into quests view).sliceabsentM10run_quests_tests.gd

cartography sliceMulti-zone world map with settlement founding.sliceabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-current-home

charter sliceCharter terms and covenant system.sliceabsentM10run_charter_tests.gdgolden:charter-terms

tutorial modalOnboarding tutorial overlay.modalabsentM10golden:tutorial-center
Achievements & trophiesNo counter tracking or trophy/collection UI.systemabsentM10run_achievements_tests.gdgolden:achievements-trophies-mixed
Cartography & zonesNo map render, no zone switching, no settlement founding, no road network. The mine is a board-pool swap, not a zone.systemabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-founder-picker
Chronicle & story timelineNo timeline of completed story beats.systemabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:chronicle-progressed
Crafting stations (Bakery/Forge/Larder)Basic recipe listing in TownScreen (2 recipes: Bakery/Kitchen); no rich station UI, no tier-gating UI. Logic is sound.systempartialM10run_economy_tests.gdgolden:crafting-bakery
Daily rewardsNo once-per-day login bonus or progressive reward tiers.systemabsentM10run_daily_rewards_tests.gd
Story beats & narrativeNo beat progression, narrative modals, choice system, or chronicle view.systemabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:story-prompt
Tile collection browser77 tile PNGs on disk but only ~17 wired; no catalog/discovery/research UI.systemabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-farm-grass
Townsfolk & NPCsNo NPC roster, bonding, dialog, or order multipliers; orders are anonymous.systemabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-bosses
Tutorial & onboardingNo multi-step tutorial modal teaching chain/tools/tier-up/orders.systemabsentM10golden:tutorial-center

town-mine-settlementMine zone settlement view; depends on M10 zones.goldenabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:town-mine-settlement
town-unfounded-blockedBlocked unfounded zone; depends on M10 cartography.goldenabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:town-unfounded-blocked
townsfolk-bossesTownsfolk bosses tab; depends on M10 townsfolk.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-bosses
townsfolk-castleTownsfolk castle connections; depends on M10 townsfolk.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-castle
townsfolk-questsTownsfolk quests connections; depends on M10 townsfolk/quests.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-quests
townsfolk-workersTownsfolk workers tab; depends on M10 townsfolk/workers.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-workers
tutorial-centerTutorial centered modal; depends on M10 tutorial.goldenabsentM10golden:tutorial-center
tutorial-cornerTutorial in corner; depends on M10 tutorial.goldenabsentM10golden:tutorial-corner
M11Desktop + mobile export hardening0/1 full · 0 partial · 1 absent
Desktop/HiDPI framing + responsive sizingproject.godot desktop default size + content-scale/aspect; responsive breakpoints reusing the M5 Theme/scenes; second (desktop) viewport in the visual matrix.infraabsentM11run_visual_tests.gdgolden:hidpici:web-export
boss sliceBoss encounter system ported (one boss, Frostmaw); modal confirmation re-skin handled by M5/M9.slicepartialDONErun_boss_tests.gd
Audio / SFXSynthesizes every SFX as 16-bit PCM AudioStreamWAV, ported 1:1 from src/audio/index.ts. Pooled players, mute pref persisted.systemfullDONErun_audio_tests.gd
Board chain mechanic (drag, 8-way adjacency, min-chain, boss bar)is_valid_chain/has_valid_chain ported from src/game/chain.ts; boss min_chain raises the bar.systemfullDONErun_tests.gdrun_scene_smoke.gd
Buildings / spawners / plots (logic)build/demolish/plot-gating works as LOGIC (spawner adds tile category to refill pool). Spatial placement map is the M6 gap; catalog is a 7-building subset.systemfullDONErun_building_tests.gdrun_town_ui_tests.gd
Capstone boss (Frostmaw)start_boss gating (City + mine mastery), raises min_chain, damage_boss by chain length, defeat sets town2_complete. One boss.systemfullDONErun_boss_tests.gd
Collapse / refill pipelinePure collapse()+refill() (weighted pool) plus animated visual collapse/pop-in; reshuffles dead boards.systemfullDONErun_tests.gdrun_scene_smoke.gd
Economy: coins / inventory / fractional progress accumulatorcredit_chain reproduces React resourceProgress carry-over exactly; storage cap enforced. Coins simplified (chain_len/2).systemfullDONErun_economy_tests.gdrun_state_tests.gd
Inventory ledgerRead-only grouped ledger (Farm/Refined/Mine/Other) with counts, sell prices, line + total value. Pure compute helpers tested.systemfullDONErun_inventory_tests.gd
Market (sell / buy)sell/buy with cap discipline + markup (sink not arbitrage); buy logic tested but TownScreen is sell-only (no UI surface).systemfullDONErun_economy_tests.gd
Mine expedition (Town 2)enter_mine converts supplies->turns, mine pool swaps board, soft-fail on turn exhaustion, leave_mine. Single shared inventory.systemfullDONErun_mine_tests.gd
NPC orders (coin sink)Seeded RNG generation, refill to MAX_ORDERS, fill_order with reward > market incentive; wired to TownScreen.systemfullDONErun_orders_tests.gd
Rats hazard (Town 3)RAT tiles seed farm pool once town2_complete; Ratcatcher + Master Ratcatcher. Note: RAT has no PNG (flat placeholder) -> art fed in M7.systemfullDONErun_rats_tests.gd
Rubble hazard (mine cave-ins)RUBBLE seeds mine pool; cleared by STONE chains sweeping 8-adjacent rubble. No PNG yet (flat placeholder) -> art fed in M7.systemfullDONErun_rubble_tests.gd
Save / loadVersioned JSON to user://save.json, mismatched versions discarded; from_dict defensively parsed. Round-trip tested.systemfullDONErun_state_tests.gd
Settlement tier ladder (Camp -> City)5-tier ladder with caps/plots/unlocks and deadlock-free escalating costs; can_tier_up/try_tier_up wired + tested.systemfullDONErun_town_tests.gdrun_state_tests.gd
Town list UI (build/sell/fill button rows)TownScreen.gd list-modal of build/refine/market/orders/expedition rows; every button registered under a stable key for tests. Spatial map is M6.systemfullDONErun_town_ui_tests.gd
inventory sliceInventory ledger ported; grid/list/search re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.slicepartialM5run_inventory_tests.gdgolden:inventory-grid-all
orders sliceOrders logic + TownScreen section ported; re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.slicepartialM5run_orders_tests.gdgolden:orders-mixed
settings sliceOptions/mute pref ported in MenuScreen; re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.slicepartialM5run_menu_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-settings
inventory viewResource inventory and search; re-skin onto Theme+scenes in M5.viewpartialM5run_inventory_tests.gdgolden:inventory-grid-all
orders viewNPC trade orders; re-skin onto Theme+scenes in M5.viewpartialM5run_orders_tests.gdgolden:orders-mixed
leaveBoard modalLeave-board confirmation; wired through the M5 router/ModalShell.modalabsentM5run_router_tests.gdgolden:shell-leave-board-confirm
menu modalMenuScreen ported; re-skin onto ModalShell + router in M5.modalpartialM5run_menu_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-main
inventory-full-with-progressInventory nearly full; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-full-with-progress
inventory-grid-allInventory grid view; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-grid-all
inventory-list-modeInventory list view; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-list-mode
inventory-mid-progressInventory with some resources; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-mid-progress
inventory-search-emptyInventory search with no results; search UI added in M5 re-skin.goldenabsentM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:inventory-search-empty
orders-mixedOrders view with mixed filled/unfilled; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:orders-mixed
shell-leave-board-confirmLeave board confirmation; wired through the M5 router/ModalShell.goldenabsentM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-leave-board-confirm
shell-menu-mainSettings menu main tab; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-main
shell-menu-settingsSettings menu options tab; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.goldenpartialM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-menu-settings
shell-toast-bubbleToast notification; toast component lands with the M5 UI vocabulary.goldenabsentM5run_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-toast-bubble
market sliceMarket trades ported (sell+buy tested); buy UI surface + price drift land with the town surfaces in M6.slicepartialM6run_economy_tests.gdgolden:town-market-news
town viewSpatial town building-placement map with roads/river/trees. Godot has a button-row list, not a map.viewabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gde2e:town-buildgolden:town-home-built-out
shell-town-freshTown view from shell; depends on M6 spatial town map.goldenabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gdgolden:shell-town-fresh
town-build-picker-lockedBuilding picker with locked buildings; depends on M6.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-build-picker-locked
town-build-picker-readyBuilding picker ready to build; depends on M6 BuildPicker scene.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-build-picker-ready
town-building-tooltipBuilding placement tooltip; depends on M6 Plot/BuildingTooltip scenes.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-building-tooltip
town-home-built-outTown with multiple buildings placed; depends on M6 spatial town map.goldenabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gde2e:town-buildgolden:town-home-built-out
town-home-freshTown at start (no buildings); depends on M6 spatial town map.goldenabsentM6run_town_layout_tests.gdgolden:town-home-fresh
town-market-newsTown market news/prices; market BUY surface wired into the M6 town.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-market-news
town-placement-modeBuilding placement mode active; depends on M6.goldenabsentM6run_town_ui_tests.gdgolden:town-placement-mode
farm sliceFarm biome board ported; tile effects/art + farm-specific juice land in M7.slicepartialM7run_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-idle
mine sliceMine expedition + rubble ported; full hazard set + tile art land in M7.slicepartialM7run_mine_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-hazards
board viewMain puzzle board gameplay; renders but lacks tile art + effects until M7.viewpartialM7run_scene_smoke.gdgolden:board-farm-idle
Board animations & effectsTween juice exists (fly-to-coins chip, pop-in, chain glow); lacks GPUParticles, cascade/refill tweening, seasonal tint, floaters.systempartialM7run_assets_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-chain-7
Farm hazards (Fire/Rats/Wolves)Rats fully ported; fire/wolves absent. Hazard visual overlays + missing tile art come in M7.systempartialM7run_rats_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-fire-rats
Mine hazards (Cave-in/Gas Vent/Lava/Mole)Rubble (cave-in) ported; gas-vent/lava/mole absent. Hazard overlays + missing tile art come in M7.systempartialM7run_rubble_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-hazards
board-farm-chain-7Farm with 7-tile chain highlight; tile art + chain-glow polish (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-chain-7
board-farm-fire-ratsFarm with fire and rat hazards; rat art + fire system overlays (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-fire-rats
board-farm-idleFarm biome board at start; needs tile art feed (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-idle
board-mine-hazardsMine with cave-in/gas-vent/lava hazards; rubble art + hazard overlays (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-hazards
board-mine-idleMine biome board at start; needs mine tile art feed (M7).goldenpartialM7run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-mine-idle
debug modalDebug panel; pairs with the test/deep-link harness in M-infra.modalabsentM-infragolden:shell-debug-modal
shell-debug-modalDebug panel modal; pairs with the deep-link/test harness in M-infra.goldenabsentM-infrarun_visual_tests.gdgolden:shell-debug-modal
E2E input-sim DSL (InputEvent + scene-state harness)No input simulation today. Build an InputEventMouseButton/Key + scene-state DSL beside run_slice_e2e.gd; port ~5 Playwright specs.infraabsentM-infrae2e:smokee2e:navigatione2e:chaine2e:town-build
GdUnit4 adoption (auto-discovery + parallel unit suites)Adopt GdUnit4 + gdUnit GitHub action; migrate the 17 monolithic run_*.gd runners one class per system, kept as a compatibility harness until migrated.infraabsentM-infragdunit4:suite-greenci:godot-ci.yml
Parity-matrix CI validation checkParses docs/parity-matrix.json and fails if any 'full' row names a run_*.gd suite that does not exist on disk. Built in this PR; wired into godot-ci.yml in M-infra.infraabsentM-infracheck-parity-matrix.mjsci:godot-ci.yml
Post-export web smoke (serve godot/dist + Playwright)Closes the 'export succeeds but untested' gap: serve godot/dist after Web export and run a Playwright smoke spec against it.infraabsentM-infraci:web-smokee2e:smoke-web
Visual golden-diff suite (run_visual_tests.gd + __goldens__ diff)Generalize tools/screenshot.gd into a scenario x viewport matrix capturing PNGs under godot/tests/visual/__goldens__/{scenario}/{vp}.png with pixelwise diff.infraabsentM-infrarun_visual_tests.gdgolden:__goldens__-diff
portal sliceMagic tools that auto-apply without board selection; ported with M8 tools/tool-powers.sliceabsentM8run_tools_tests.gde2e:tools
portal viewMagic tools; ported with M8 tools/tool-powers.viewabsentM8run_tools_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-tool-rake
Abilities & tool powersNo ability/power system. Magic tools (golden apple, philosophers_stone) with fill_bias/tap-target/instant powers, ported with M8 tools.systemabsentM8run_tools_tests.gde2e:toolsgolden:board-farm-fertilizer-active
Tools (axe/bomb/rake/shovel + 20+ others)No tool items, no tool-use action, no tool powers. LOGIC FIRST: ToolConfig.gd + GameState.use_tool before any palette UI.systemabsentM8run_tools_tests.gde2e:toolsgolden:board-farm-tool-rake
board-farm-fertilizer-activeFarm with fertilizer effect; depends on M8 tool-powers.goldenpartialM8run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-fertilizer-active
board-farm-tool-bombFarm with bomb tool active; depends on M8 tool palette.goldenpartialM8run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-tool-bomb
board-farm-tool-rakeFarm with rake tool active; depends on M8 tool palette.goldenpartialM8run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-tool-rake
board-farm-tool-sickleFarm with sickle tool active; depends on M8 tool palette.goldenpartialM8run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-farm-tool-sickle
boons sliceSeason modifiers and powerups.sliceabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gdgolden:boons-farm
festivals sliceSeasonal events modal.sliceabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gd
runSummary sliceSeason end recap and statistics modal.sliceabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gdgolden:run-summary
boons viewSeason modifiers view.viewabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gdgolden:boons-farm
boss modalBoss confirmation ported; weather/run-summary polish in M9.modalpartialM9run_boss_tests.gdgolden:boss-modal
festivals modalSeasonal events modal.modalabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gd
runSummary modalSeason end summary modal.modalabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gdgolden:run-summary
season modalSeason transition prompt.modalabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gd
Seasons & calendarIntentionally dropped: turn is a monotonic counter. No seasonal boons, tint, or recap modal yet.systemabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gde2e:seasongolden:run-summary

board-boss-minimizedBoss encounter minimized; weather polish lands with M9.goldenpartialM9run_visual_tests.gdgolden:board-boss-minimized

boons-farmBoons selection for farm; depends on M9 boons.goldenabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gdgolden:boons-farm
boss-modalBoss encounter modal; re-skin/weather polish in M9.goldenpartialM9run_visual_tests.gdgolden:boss-modal
run-summarySeason end summary modal; depends on M9 seasons/runSummary.goldenabsentM9run_seasons_tests.gdgolden:run-summary
achievements sliceTrophy/collection tracker for gameplay milestones.sliceabsentM10run_achievements_tests.gd
almanac sliceQuest reference (now merged into quests view).sliceabsentM10run_quests_tests.gd
bosses sliceBoss gallery/information view; only the single ported boss exists. Roster view lands with townsfolk in M10.slicepartialM10run_boss_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-bosses
cartography sliceMulti-zone world map with settlement founding.sliceabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-current-home
castle sliceSettlement tier progression building (the tier LADDER itself is ported; this is the castle surface).sliceabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-castle
charter sliceCharter terms and covenant system.sliceabsentM10run_charter_tests.gdgolden:charter-terms
chronicle sliceStory timeline and completed narrative beats.sliceabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:chronicle-progressed
crafting sliceRecipe system; Godot has 2 recipes (bakery/kitchen). Full station set + rich UI lands in M10.slicepartialM10run_economy_tests.gdgolden:crafting-bakery
decorations sliceBuilding decorations and cosmetics.sliceabsentM10run_decorations_tests.gd
fish sliceHarbor/fishing biome board mechanics (tides, pearl capture).sliceabsentM10run_fish_tests.gdgolden:board-fish-idle-high-tide
npcs sliceNPC roster, bonding, and dialog system.sliceabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-workers

story sliceNarrative beats and choice system.sliceabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:story-choices

townsfolk sliceNPC roster view with bonding tiers.sliceabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-quests

wiki sliceRecipe reference and crafting wiki.sliceabsentM10run_wiki_tests.gd
workers sliceSettlement worker system and effects.sliceabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-workers
zones sliceMulti-biome system; Godot mine is a board-pool swap, not a true zone. Full zone model lands in M10.slicepartialM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-current-home
achievements viewTrophy and collection tracking.viewabsentM10run_achievements_tests.gdgolden:achievements-trophies-mixed
bosses viewBoss gallery; only the single ported boss exists.viewpartialM10run_boss_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-bosses
cartography viewWorld map and zone navigation.viewabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-founder-picker
castle viewSettlement tier advancement view.viewabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-castle

crafting viewRecipe crafting interface; basic listing today, rich station UI in M10.viewpartialM10run_economy_tests.gdgolden:crafting-bakery
decorations viewBuilding decorations management.viewabsentM10run_decorations_tests.gd
quests viewDaily and almanac quests.viewabsentM10run_quests_tests.gdgolden:quests-almanac-mixed

tutorial modalOnboarding tutorial overlay.modalabsentM10golden:tutorial-center
Achievements & trophiesNo counter tracking or trophy/collection UI.systemabsentM10run_achievements_tests.gdgolden:achievements-trophies-mixed
Cartography & zonesNo map render, no zone switching, no settlement founding, no road network. The mine is a board-pool swap, not a zone.systemabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-founder-picker
Chronicle & story timelineNo timeline of completed story beats.systemabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:chronicle-progressed
Crafting stations (Bakery/Forge/Larder)Basic recipe listing in TownScreen (2 recipes: Bakery/Kitchen); no rich station UI, no tier-gating UI. Logic is sound.systempartialM10run_economy_tests.gdgolden:crafting-bakery
Daily rewardsNo once-per-day login bonus or progressive reward tiers.systemabsentM10run_daily_rewards_tests.gd
Story beats & narrativeNo beat progression, narrative modals, choice system, or chronicle view.systemabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:story-prompt
Tile collection browser77 tile PNGs on disk but only ~17 wired; no catalog/discovery/research UI.systemabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-farm-grass
Townsfolk & NPCsNo NPC roster, bonding, dialog, or order multipliers; orders are anonymous.systemabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-bosses
Tutorial & onboardingNo multi-step tutorial modal teaching chain/tools/tier-up/orders.systemabsentM10golden:tutorial-center

map-current-homeMap showing current home zone; depends on M10 cartography.goldenabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-current-home
map-empty-panelMap with no zone selected; depends on M10 cartography.goldenabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:map-empty-panel

story-barStory bar on board; depends on M10 story.goldenabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:story-bar

story-winStory win condition; depends on M10 story.goldenabsentM10run_story_tests.gdgolden:story-win
tiles-activate-grass-spikyTile collection activation state; depends on M10 tile-collection.goldenabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-activate-grass-spiky

tiles-farm-grassTile collection farm grass entry; depends on M10 tile-collection.goldenabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-farm-grass
tiles-free-moves-chipTile collection free moves chip; depends on M10 tile-collection.goldenabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-free-moves-chip
tiles-hazardsTile collection hazards entries; depends on M10 tile-collection.goldenabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-hazards
tiles-mining-stoneTile collection mining stone entry; depends on M10 tile-collection.goldenabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-mining-stone
tiles-research-progressTile collection research progress; depends on M10 tile-collection.goldenabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-research-progress
tiles-water-fishTile collection water fish entry; depends on M10 tile-collection + fish.goldenabsentM10run_tile_collection_tests.gdgolden:tiles-water-fish
town-found-biome-pickerBiome selection for new settlement; depends on M10 cartography founding.goldenabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:town-found-biome-picker
town-harbor-settlementHarbor zone settlement view; depends on M10 fish/zones.goldenabsentM10run_fish_tests.gdgolden:town-harbor-settlement
town-mine-settlementMine zone settlement view; depends on M10 zones.goldenabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:town-mine-settlement
town-unfounded-blockedBlocked unfounded zone; depends on M10 cartography.goldenabsentM10run_cartography_tests.gdgolden:town-unfounded-blocked
townsfolk-bossesTownsfolk bosses tab; depends on M10 townsfolk.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-bosses
townsfolk-castleTownsfolk castle connections; depends on M10 townsfolk.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-castle
townsfolk-questsTownsfolk quests connections; depends on M10 townsfolk/quests.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-quests
townsfolk-workersTownsfolk workers tab; depends on M10 townsfolk/workers.goldenabsentM10run_townsfolk_tests.gdgolden:townsfolk-workers
tutorial-centerTutorial centered modal; depends on M10 tutorial.goldenabsentM10golden:tutorial-center
tutorial-cornerTutorial in corner; depends on M10 tutorial.goldenabsentM10golden:tutorial-corner
Desktop/HiDPI framing + responsive sizingproject.godot desktop default size + content-scale/aspect; responsive breakpoints reusing the M5 Theme/scenes; second (desktop) viewport in the visual matrix.infraabsentM11run_visual_tests.gdgolden:hidpici:web-export

How this stays honest. Every milestone PR flips the rows it closes and fills verified_by with the real artifact names it added. tools/check-parity-matrix.mjs (CI) parses the JSON and fails if any full row references a run_*.gd suite that does not exist on disk — so the matrix cannot drift ahead of reality. verified_by entries prefixed e2e: / golden: / ci: / gdunit4: are forward-looking artifact names for not-yet-done rows and are not validated.
